title: Search
description: Adds a search bar to the options menu
body:
This mod adds a search bar to the options menu. You can search for anything inside the categories or just search the categories themselves. It is very intuitive and easy to use.


________________________________________________________________________________________________




![An example with the button in the top right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80308bffcd8ceda676a6821f5859256228afb3df_0.webp)

________________________________________________________________________________________________

![Searching](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9c9ce817471d3bf96efaec800f116d01e467df1_0.webp)


________________________________________________________________________________________________


The search button is located in the top right corner of the options menu. To search you just have to click on the button and type whatever you want to search for. The mod can still contain some bugs, feel free to let me know!
